message:
fix(mux): use first nontrivial stack slot for cycle forward/backward

The CycleStackForward/Backward keybindings previously hardcoded slot 0,
which could target a trivial (single-pane) stack. Now dynamically finds
the first slot with >1 pane via first_nontrivial_stack_slot_index().
Includes unit test for the new method and cycle round-trip behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
